item.title: v2.4.5
item.description:
v2.4.5

  • Streamlined Agent Sessions into a compact, search-first browser with clearer section names and denser rows.
  • Fresh installs now use Option-Command with 1-9 for visible pills and 0 for More Sessions. Existing shortcut choices are preserved.
  • Improved Accessibility setup and recovery by identifying the exact running app and separating Agent Visor Dev from the installed release.
  • Corrected Homebrew installation guidance and strengthened release-package verification.

item.title: v2.4.4
item.description:
v2.4.4

  • First Agent Visor release on its dedicated app and update identity.
  • Monitor and navigate Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and terminal-hosted sessions from the menu bar.
  • Search all recent sessions with keyboard navigation and global shortcuts.
  • Improved multi-display and full-screen pill behavior, source-aware navigation, and Codex usage visibility.
